creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
KDreamsite is a rather beta-ish WYSIWYG HTML editor. It needed
a rather large number of bugfixes, as I have indicated with my
patches below. It is also being developed by English-deprived
people in Germany, so it is a little difficult to understand..

How-To-Repeat: 
Use the shar below to import the new port to the tree.
